test.name: Add Shift Using CSV

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Add Shift Test
Add Shift in Beeway
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'rgarikapati' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder="Enter Username"])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Textfield with placeholder ${PLACEHOLDER} filled with value ${VALUE}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'E7q_35&ZR]5D*iRZ' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder="Enter Password"])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Textfield with placeholder ${PLACEHOLDER} filled with value ${VALUE}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//ul[contains(@class,'dropdown-list') and contains(@class,'shown')]//li[contains(normalize-space(), 'Prince of Wales Private Hospital')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select Date from Hospital Schedule
kw.msg: Keyword 'BeewayDashboardPage.Select Date from Hospital Schedule' expected 4 arguments, got 3.
kw.status: Keyword 'BeewayDashboardPage.Select Date from Hospital Schedule' expected 4 arguments, got 3.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Login to Bijib and add shift in Beeway
kw.status: Keyword 'BeewayDashboardPage.Select Date from Hospital Schedule' expected 4 arguments, got 3.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Shift Exist Status Admin Login
Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.arg: COMMENTS=As per email from Dr {name} on {date}.
kw.status: Keyword 'BeewayDashboardPage.Select Date from Hospital Schedule' expected 4 arguments, got 3.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.status: Keyword 'BeewayDashboardPage.Select Date from Hospital Schedule' expected 4 arguments, got 3.

Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//ul[contains(@class,'dropdown-list') and contains(@class,'shown')]//li[contains(normalize-space(), 'Prince of Wales Private Hospital')]'.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
